title: Myanmar Civil Law (မြန်မာ့တရားမဥပဒေ)
author: U Ba
description: A comprehensive guide to civil law procedures and regulations in Myanmar, updated with the latest amendments.

title: Criminal Procedure Code (ရာဇဝတ်ကျင့်ထုံးဥပဒေ)
author: Daw Hla
description: Detailed analysis of the Criminal Procedure Code of Myanmar for legal practitioners and students.

title: Constitution of Myanmar (ဖွဲ့စည်းပုံအခြေခံဥပဒေ)
author: Ministry of Justice
description: The official text of the 2008 Constitution of the Republic of the Union of Myanmar.

title: Business Law Essentials (စီးပွားရေးဥပဒေအခြေခံ)
author: U Kyaw
description: Essential legal knowledge for business owners and entrepreneurs in Myanmar.

title: International Human Rights Law
author: Dr. Smith
description: An overview of international human rights standards and their application in the regional context.

title: Court Procedures Manual
author: Supreme Court
description: Official manual for court procedures and filing requirements in Myanmar courts.

title: Myanmar Customary Law
author: U Myint
description: Exploration of customary laws and traditions integrated into the Myanmar legal system.
